violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and put out of service at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to send proof of cleaning to inspector before using. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The hot water handle for the hand sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The condensate from the air conditioner was observed draining into the bathroom hand washing sink. Condensate/wastewater must drain into and drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
